problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: The key to What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? is Shape memory alloy phase transition — specifically Shape memory alloy — which would help 700,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
